description_long: This object is a set of three skateboards, each featuring a unique and vibrant graphic on the underside of the deck. The left skateboard displays a playful panda and bird illustration on an orange background, while the right skateboard features a koi fish swimming on a teal background. The center skateboard showcases a stylized cactus with a face on a purple background. All three decks have black grip tape on top, standard double-kick shapes, and are equipped with metal trucks and colored wheels—purple, orange, and teal. The wheels are classic street style, and the trucks are standard silver with visible mounting hardware. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for urban environments such as skate parks or city streets.
description: A trio of skateboards with colorful, cartoon-style graphics on the decks, black grip tape, and vibrant wheels, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the teal skateboard with a koi fish graphic and turquoise wheels, showing the deck's thickness and wheel arrangement.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the black grip tape on all three decks, with colored wheels peeking from the sides.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the orange skateboard with a panda and bird graphic, featuring orange wheels and the deck's profile.
description_view_3: Frontal view of all three skateboards, clearly showing the unique deck graphics, wheel colors, and truck details.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The left deck features a cartoon panda and bird on an orange background, the center deck has a stylized cactus with a face on a purple background, and the right deck displays a koi fish on a teal background. All graphics are colorful, playful, and cartoon-like, with no visible text.
attribute_wheel_type: classic street wheels; left: orange, center: purple, right: teal; no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard silver trucks with traditional kingpin, no visible branding, mounted with exposed hardware.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black grip tape with no visible patterns, graphics, or text.
